---
title: "LLM Radar"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: [cosmo, custom.scss]
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/ronaldmego/llm-radar
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "src")
import numpy as np
from api_client import OpenRouterClient
from data_processor import process_models, summary_stats
from visualizations import newest_table, cheapest_capable_table

df = process_models(OpenRouterClient().get_models())
stats = summary_stats(df)
```

## Row {height=24%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Models tracked"
dict(value=stats["total_models"], icon="boxes", color="#1f3a5f")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Providers"
dict(value=stats["providers"], icon="building", color="#2563a8")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "New this week"
dict(value=stats["new_this_week"], icon="stars", color="#a8482b")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Biggest context"
dict(value=f'{stats["max_context_k"]:,}K', icon="arrows-angle-expand", color="#15803d")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Free models"
dict(value=stats["free_models"], icon="gift", color="#16202e")
```

## Row {height=76%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{python}
#| title: Newest
#| echo: false
newest_table(df)
```

```{python}
#| title: Cheapest capable
#| echo: false
cheapest_capable_table(df)
```

::: {.card title="Full catalog — search & sort"}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
cols = ["name", "provider", "context_k", "price_in", "price_out", "modalities", "created_str"]
records = df[cols].replace({np.nan: None}).to_dict("records")
ojs_define(models=records)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof q = Inputs.search(models, { placeholder: `Search ${models.length} models…` })
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Inputs.table(q, {
  columns: ["name", "provider", "context_k", "price_in", "price_out", "modalities", "created_str"],
  header: {
    name: "Model", provider: "Provider", context_k: "Context (K)",
    price_in: "$/1M in", price_out: "$/1M out", modalities: "Modalities", created_str: "Added"
  },
  sort: "created_str",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 20,
  layout: "auto"
})
```

:::
